summary:
Change date/time text in EventHero block to use the heading font (Anton / font-heading). The date/time

element on line 289 (TSX) and line 154 (PHP) currently uses 'text-lg font-medium leading-[1.2] text-charcoal'. Replace with 'font-heading text-lg leading-[1.2] text-charcoal' — adding font-heading and removing font-medium (Anton has its own weight). Per project typography rules, do NOT add uppercase or italic classes to Anton text.

fileChanges.description:
Change date/time

element classes to use font-heading instead of font-medium
fileChanges.details: Line 289: Change className from 'text-lg font-medium leading-[1.2] text-charcoal' to 'font-heading text-lg leading-[1.2] text-charcoal'. Remove font-medium since Anton has its own weight characteristics. Do NOT add uppercase or italic per project typography rules.

fileChanges.description:
Change date/time

element classes to use font-heading instead of font-medium
fileChanges.details: Line 154: Change class from 'text-lg font-medium leading-[1.2] text-charcoal' to 'font-heading text-lg leading-[1.2] text-charcoal'. Remove font-medium since Anton has its own weight. Do NOT add uppercase or italic per project typography rules.

designDecisions: Only the date/time line gets font-heading. The venue and cost lines remain unchanged with their current body font styling (text-lg font-medium), as the user's request is specifically about date and time.
Removing font-medium when adding font-heading because Anton has inherent weight characteristics and font-medium would conflict or be redundant.
No uppercase or italic classes added per project typography rules for Anton font.
